info.name: Soracom Group Configuration API
info.description: Manage groups and per-service configuration for Soracom Air, Beam, Funnel, Funk, Harvest, Junction, and Orbit.

variable.description: (Required) Parameter name to be deleted. (This will be part of a URL path, so it needs to be percent-encoded. In JavaScript, specify the name after it has been encoded using encodeURIComponent().)

request.description: Delete parameters for the specified group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The specified group does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Delete a namespace for the specified group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The specified namespace does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The specified group does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

variable.description: (Required) ID of the target group. The group ID can be obtained via the [Group:listGroups API](#!/Group/listGroups).

(Required) A string indicating the configuration target. It varies depending on the configuration content.

- `SoracomAir`: Custom DNS, Metadata service, VPG (Virtual Private Gateway), CHAP authentication, Simple Location function, Binary Parser.
- `SoracomBeam`: SORACOM Beam.
- `SoracomEndorse`: SORACOM Endorse.
- `SoracomFunk`: SORACOM Funk.
- `SoracomFunnel`: SORACOM Funnel.
- `SoracomHarvest`: SORACOM Harvest Data.
- `SoracomHarvestFiles`: SORACOM Harvest Files.
- `SoracomKrypton`: SORACOM Krypton.
- `SoracomOrbit`: SORACOM Orbit.
- `UnifiedEndpoint`: Unified Endpoint.

request.description: Updates the configuration of the specified group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The specified Group does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of results per response page.
The IMSI of the last subscriber retrieved on the previous page. By specifying this parameter, you can continue to retrieve the list from the next subscriber onward.

request.description: Returns a list of subscribers that belong to the specified group by group ID.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of results per response page.
The IMSI of the last subscriber retrieved on the previous page. By specifying this parameter, you can continue to retrieve the list from the next subscriber onward.

response.name: The specified group does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of results per response page.
The IMSI of the last subscriber retrieved on the previous page. By specifying this parameter, you can continue to retrieve the list from the next subscriber onward.

variable.description: (Required) Tag name to be deleted. (This will be part of a URL path, so it needs to be percent-encoded. In JavaScript, specify the name after it has been encoded using encodeURIComponent().)

request.description: Deletes tag from the specified group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The specified group or the tag does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Adds/updates tags of specified configuration group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The specified group does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Deletes the group specified by Group ID.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The specified group does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Returns the group specified by the group ID.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The specified group does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Tag name of the group. Filters through all groups that exactly match the tag name. When tag_name is specified, tag_value is required.
Maximum number of results per response page.
The last Group ID retrieved on the current page. By specifying this parameter, you can continue to retrieve the list from the next group onward.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Tag name of the group. Filters through all groups that exactly match the tag name. When tag_name is specified, tag_value is required.
Maximum number of results per response page.
The last Group ID retrieved on the current page. By specifying this parameter, you can continue to retrieve the list from the next group onward.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
